## 2. Ergonomics & Intuitiveness

### Navigation Assessment

- [ ] Intuitive: Novice users can find their way without help
- [ ] Learnable: Takes some discovery but consistent patterns
- [ ] Confusing: Users frequently get lost

**Evidence**:
- Intuitive elements: [EXAMPLES]
- Confusing elements: [EXAMPLES]

### Labeling & Clarity

- [ ] Clear: Users understand what each button/link does
- [ ] Mostly clear: Some ambiguity
- [ ] Unclear: Frequent misunderstandings

**Problem labels**:
- [LABEL]: Unclear because [REASON]
- [LABEL]: Unclear because [REASON]

### Interaction Consistency

- [ ] Consistent: Interactions behave predictably across product
- [ ] Mostly consistent: Some exceptions
- [ ] Inconsistent: Unpredictable interactions

**Consistency issues**:
- [INTERACTION]: Behaves inconsistently in [CONTEXTS]

### Visual Feedback

- [ ] Strong: Users know what happened after every action
- [ ] Adequate: Most actions have feedback
- [ ] Weak: Many actions lack feedback

**Missing feedback**:
- [ACTION]: No visual feedback — [RISK]

---

## 3. Design System & Visual Coherence

### Design System Status

- [ ] Formally documented: [LINK_TO_SYSTEM]
- [ ] Partially documented: [ELEMENTS_DOCUMENTED]
- [ ] Not documented

### Design System Adherence

- [ ] High: System is consistently applied across product
- [ ] Medium: 70-80% adherence, some exceptions
- [ ] Low: Inconsistent use, many variations

**Variations observed**:
- [COMPONENT]: Used inconsistently in [LOCATIONS]
- [COMPONENT]: Used inconsistently in [LOCATIONS]

### Visual Perception

- [ ] Professional: Product feels polished and intentional
- [ ] Adequate: Acceptable but not exceptional
- [ ] Amateur: Feels makeshift or rushed

---

## 4. Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 / RGAA Compliance)

### Contrast & Color

- [ ] Compliant: All text meets 4.5:1 contrast minimum
- [ ] Partial: Most text compliant, some failures
- [ ] Non-compliant: Significant contrast issues

**Issues**:
- [ELEMENT]: [ACTUAL_CONTRAST] vs [REQUIRED] — Risk: [USERS_AFFECTED]

### Keyboard Navigation

- [ ] Full support: All features accessible via keyboard
- [ ] Partial: Most features keyboard-accessible
- [ ] None: Keyboard navigation missing

**Missing keyboard support**:
- [FEATURE]: Not keyboard accessible — [IMPACT]

### Form Labels & Associations

- [ ] Proper: All form inputs have associated labels
- [ ] Partial: Some inputs lack labels
- [ ] Missing: No label associations

### Alternative Text for Images

- [ ] Comprehensive: All images have meaningful alt text
- [ ] Partial: Most images covered, some gaps
- [ ] Missing: Alt text absent

**Missing alt text**:
- [LOCATION]: [N] images without alt text

### Screen Reader Support

- [ ] Full: Product tested and works with screen readers
- [ ] Partial: Works partially with screen readers
- [ ] Limited: Not designed for screen readers

---

### Critical Friction Points

| Friction | Severity | User Impact | Effort to Fix |
|----------|----------|-------------|---------------|
| [FRICTION_1] | [ ] High [ ] Medium [ ] Low | [IMPACT] | [EFFORT] |
| [FRICTION_2] | | | |

**Top 3 for new users**:
1. [FRICTION]: Causes [% ABANDONMENT] abandonment
2. [FRICTION]: Causes [% ABANDONMENT] abandonment
3. [FRICTION]: Causes [% ABANDONMENT] abandonment

### Error Messages & Feedback

- [ ] Clear: Users understand what went wrong and what to do
- [ ] Vague: Users unsure how to recover
- [ ] Missing: No feedback on failures

**Problem messages**:
- [ERROR_SCENARIO]: Message is unclear — [ISSUE]

### Perception of Speed & Fluidity

- [ ] Fast: Product feels responsive and snappy
- [ ] Acceptable: Some delays but generally smooth
- [ ] Slow: Noticeable delays frustrate users

**Slow operations**:
- [OPERATION]: Takes [TIME_SECONDS] seconds — Acceptable? [ ] Yes [ ] No

## 7. Responsive & Mobile Experience

### Responsive Design

- [ ] Fully responsive: Works on all screen sizes
- [ ] Mostly responsive: Minor issues on some sizes
- [ ] Not responsive: Mobile experience is compromised

**Issues**:
- [SCREEN_SIZE]: [PROBLEM]
- [SCREEN_SIZE]: [PROBLEM]

### Mobile-Specific UX

- [ ] Optimized: Touch targets, readable fonts, mobile navigation
- [ ] Adequate: Usable but not optimized
- [ ] Poor: Mobile experience is inferior

**Mobile friction**:
- [FRICTION]: Makes mobile use difficult — [REASON]

- [ ] Confusing: New users need help

### Estimated Abandonment Rate

- First visit to first action: [% ABANDON]

## Evaluation Grid — Axis 3

| Criterion | Score (1-5) | Weight | Justification |
|-----------|-------------|--------|----------------|
| **User Journey Clarity** | [SCORE] | 15% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Persona Quality & Documentation** | [SCORE] | 10% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Ergonomics & Intuitiveness** | [SCORE] | 15% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Design System Coherence** | [SCORE] | 12% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Accessibility (WCAG/RGAA)** | [SCORE] | 15% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **User Friction Level** | [SCORE] | 15% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Feedback Mechanism in Place** | [SCORE] | 10% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **Responsive & Mobile Quality** | [SCORE] | 8% | [OBSERVATION] |
| **AXIS 3 GLOBAL SCORE** | **[AVERAGE]** | **100%** | **[SUMMARY]** |

*Note: For friction, 5 = minimal friction, 1 = high friction recurring issues*

---

## Key Recommendations

1. **If accessibility score < 3**: Audit against WCAG 2.1 AA + create remediation roadmap
2. **If journey clarity < 3**: Map actual user flows and test with real users
3. **If friction score < 3**: Prioritize top 3 friction points for next sprint
4. **If design system < 3**: Create or formalize design system and enforce adherence

---

- **UX friction impact on user retention** (linked to vision/mission): [INSIGHT]
- **Technical debt preventing UX improvements** (Axis 2): [INSIGHT]
- **Team sentiment about product UX** (Axis 4): [INSIGHT]
